posts.author: Rozjs (Roz Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Now that Vibe has suggested templates (‘Ideas’), I would propose to include one for Project Status Reporting

What are you trying to achieve

Create a default Vibe template for Project Status Reporting that would include data like RAG status, project stage, top active risks, project objective/current status summary/exec summary etc. This could then be used to issue weekly reporting (once Vibe has the ability to schedule reports)
